Uses of Class
net.dapete.exceptional.stream.ExDoubleStream

Packages that use ExDoubleStream
Package
Description
net.dapete.exceptional.stream
This package provides utilities for handling checked exceptions in Streams.

  • Uses of ExDoubleStream in net.dapete.exceptional.stream

    Returns an empty instance.
    ExDoubleStream
    ExDoubleStream.exDropWhile(ExDoublePredicate<?> predicate)
    Equivalent of DoubleStream.dropWhile(DoublePredicate).
    ExDoubleStream
    ExDoubleStream.exFilter(ExDoublePredicate<?> predicate)
    Equivalent of DoubleStream.filter(DoublePredicate).
    ExDoubleStream
    ExDoubleStream.exFlatMap(ExDoubleFunction<? extends DoubleStream, ?> mapper)
    Equivalent of DoubleStream.flatMap(DoubleFunction).
    ExDoubleStream

    Equivalent of Stream.flatMapToDouble(Function).
    ExDoubleStream

    Equivalent of DoubleStream.map(DoubleUnaryOperator).
    ExDoubleStream
    ExDoubleStream.exMapMulti(ExDoubleMapMultiConsumer<?> mapper)
    Equivalent of DoubleStream.mapMulti(DoubleStream.DoubleMapMultiConsumer).
    ExDoubleStream

    Equivalent of Stream.mapMultiToDouble(BiConsumer).
    ExDoubleStream
    ExIntStream.exMapToDouble(ExIntToDoubleFunction<?> mapper)
    Equivalent of IntStream.mapToDouble(IntToDoubleFunction).
    ExDoubleStream

    Equivalent of LongStream.mapToDouble(LongToDoubleFunction).
    ExDoubleStream

    Equivalent of Stream.mapToDouble(ToDoubleFunction).
    ExDoubleStream

    Equivalent of DoubleStream.peek(DoubleConsumer).

    Equivalent of DoubleStream.takeWhile(DoublePredicate).
